name: JNI Compiler

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      ndk_version:
        description: "NDK version"
        required: true
        default: "r25c"
      user_id:
        description: "Telegram user ID"
        required: true
      zip_path:
        description: "Path to zip in repo"
        required: true

jobs:
  compile:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Extract sources
        run: |
          ZIP="${{ github.event.inputs.zip_path }}"
          if [ ! -f "$ZIP" ]; then
            echo "❌ Файл $ZIP не найден!"
            exit 1
          fi
          unzip -q "$ZIP" -d extracted/
          echo "📦 Содержимое:"
          find extracted/ -type f | head -30

      - name: Find jni folder
        run: |
          # Ищем папку jni или Android.mk
          JNI_DIR=$(find extracted/ -name "Android.mk" | head -1 | xargs dirname 2>/dev/null)
          if [ -z "$JNI_DIR" ]; then
            echo "❌ Android.mk не найден в архиве!"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "✅ Найден Android.mk в: $JNI_DIR"
          # Родительская папка относительно jni
          PROJECT_DIR=$(dirname "$JNI_DIR")
          echo "PROJECT_DIR=$PROJECT_DIR" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "JNI_DIR=$JNI_DIR" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Setup Android NDK
        uses: nttld/setup-ndk@v1
        id: setup-ndk
        with:
          ndk-version: ${{ github.event.inputs.ndk_version }}
          add-to-path: true

      - name: Build with ndk-build
        env:
          NDK: ${{ steps.setup-ndk.outputs.ndk-path }}
        run: |
          echo "🔨 Запускаю ndk-build в $PROJECT_DIR"
          cd "$PROJECT_DIR"
          "$NDK/ndk-build" \
            NDK_PROJECT_PATH=. \
            NDK_APPLICATION_MK=jni/Application.mk \
            APP_BUILD_SCRIPT=jni/Android.mk \
            -j$(nproc)

      - name: Collect .so files
        run: |
          mkdir -p output
          find "$PROJECT_DIR" -name "*.so" -not -path "*/sysroot/*" \
            -exec cp {} output/ \;
          echo "✅ Собранные .so:"
          find output/ -name "*.so"
          if [ -z "$(ls output/*.so 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
            echo "❌ .so файлы не найдены!"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: jni-libs-${{ github.event.inputs.user_id }}
          path: output/
          retention-days: 1
